html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Notional Fabricator is a crafting station that grants access to the Fabrication Filter. Items crafted at the Notional Fabricator cannot be prototyped.

The Notional Fabricator shows up on Hermit Island after Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger and Possessed Varg have been killed at least once. When standing next to the Notional Fabricator, Incomplete Experiment Blueprint and Astroggles Blueprint can be crafted. Also, the Grainy Transmission will appear and prompt the player to evict the Crabby Hermit with a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island.

Finishing this task will unlock the Substrate Extrapolator and then players can use Substrate Extrapolators to expand the Hermit Island into an octagonal shape. After finishing this, the Phasmo-Encapsulator will be unlocked.

After defeating the Celestial Scion, it will unlock the rest of the recipes, including W.A.R.B.O.T. Base, W.A.R.B.O.T. Parts, Static Restrainer and Spark Ark.

Crafting Recipes

Level Unlock Condition Unlock Recipes
1 Defeating Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger
and Possessed Varg at least once

Incomplete Experiment Blueprint
Astroggles Blueprint

2 Evict the Crabby Hermit Substrate Extrapolator
3 Expand the Hermit Island with Substrate Extrapolators Phasmo-Encapsulator
4 Defeating the Celestial Scion

W.A.R.B.O.T. Base Kit
W.A.R.B.O.T. Parts
Static Restrainer
Spark Ark

Gallery

  • Phasmo-Encapsulator Concept Art from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Proximity
  • Using

Exclusive to:

“Let's get to work!”
–Wilson
“Electrical fires just aren't as fun.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang not afraid of technology.”
–Wolfgang
“Still so much we don't understand.”
–Wendy
“I AM IN MY ELEMENT”
–WX-78
“The Researcher's workstation.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a fancy workbench.”
–Woodie
“What infernal devices are conjured here?”
–Maxwell
“What maketh the gear-wright nöw?”
–Wigfrid
“Can we building something fun?”
–Webber
“But does it blend?”
–Warly
“Building table build shiny things?”
–Wormwood
“That's a fine tinkerin' table.”
–Winona
“What have we here? His intentions are never clear!”
–Wortox
“Me make! Florp!”
–Wurt
“Check it out, Woby! What can we make here?”
–Walter
“Ahead of his time.”
–Wanda
The Notional Fabricator is a crafting station that grants access to the Fabrication Filter. Items crafted at the Notional Fabricator cannot be prototyped.
The Notional Fabricator shows up on Hermit Island after Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger and Possessed Varg have been killed at least once. When standing next to the Notional Fabricator, Incomplete Experiment Blueprint and Astroggles Blueprint can be crafted. Also, the Grainy Transmission will appear and prompt the player to evict the Crabby Hermit with a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island.
Finishing this task will unlock the Substrate Extrapolator and then players can use Substrate Extrapolators to expand the Hermit Island into an octagonal shape. After finishing this, the Phasmo-Encapsulator will be unlocked.
After defeating the Celestial Scion, it will unlock the rest of the recipes, including W.A.R.B.O.T. Base, W.A.R.B.O.T. Parts, Static Restrainer and Spark Ark.
